'''chanomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olaparib|olaparib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olaparib|olaparib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chanomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chænemeth|chænemeth]] || [[word:chænemej|chænemej]] || [[word:chænemesh|chænemesh]] || [[word:chæneme|chæneme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chanonomoth|chanonomoth]] || [[word:chanonomoj|chanonomoj]] || [[word:chanonomosh|chanonomosh]] || [[word:chanonomo|chanonomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanomoth|chanomoth]] || [[word:chanomoj|chanomoj]] || [[word:chanomosh|chanomosh]] || [[word:chanomo|chanomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanofmoth|chanofmoth]] || [[word:chanofmoj|chanofmoj]] || [[word:chanofmosh|chanofmosh]] || [[word:chanofmof|chanofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chanomotho|chanomotho]] || [[word:chanomojo|chanomojo]] || [[word:chanomosho|chanomosho]] || [[word:chanomoko|chanomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chanomoth|chanomoth]] || [[word:chanomoj|chanomoj]] || [[word:chanomosh|chanomosh]] || [[word:chanomo|chanomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chanomothol|chanomothol]] || [[word:chanomojol|chanomojol]] || [[word:chanomoshol|chanomoshol]] || [[word:chanomokol|chanomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chanomothotho|chanomothotho]] || [[word:chanomojojo|chanomojojo]] || [[word:chanomoshosho|chanomoshosho]] || [[word:chanomoko|chanomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chanomothon|chanomothon]] || [[word:chanomojon|chanomojon]] || [[word:chanomoshon|chanomoshon]] || [[word:chanomokon|chanomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chanomothoro|chanomothoro]] || [[word:chanomojoro|chanomojoro]] || [[word:chanomoshoro|chanomoshoro]] || [[word:chanomokoro|chanomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
